---
title: "UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview"
id: module-introduction
order: 1
summary: "A brief overview of UAV-based remote sensing in environmental research."
module-goals:
  - module-goals
materials:
  - material-1
  - material-2
  - material-hs-1
  - material-hs-5
  - material-hs-0
  - material-hs-2
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
labels:
  - basics
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/introduction/module-prerequisites.md"
title-block-banner: images/module-prerequisites/oss.jpeg
title-block-banner-color: black
listing:
  - id: module-module-goals
    contents: "../module-goals/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Goals"

  - id: module-materials
    contents: "../materials/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Materials"

  - id: module-activities
    contents: "../activities/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Activities"

  - id: module-assessments
    contents: "../assessments/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Assessments"
---



::: {#module-module-goals}
:::

::: {#module-materials}
:::

::: {#module-activities}
:::

::: {#module-assessments}
:::
